Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL03_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20531 0 0}How'd ya like our all-out combo attack, ya filthy Shadows!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL03_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 81 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20532 0 0}When I saw my opening, it's like my body just knew what to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL03_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20533 0 0}That was magnificent teamwork. It's hard to believe it's your first time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20534 0 0}As you grasp the flow of battle, you'll learn to coordinate with each other seamlessly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20535 0 0}Let's apply what we've learned so far and continue exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO_BTL04_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4585 0 0}Okay, I think this is a good place to stop.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}There's a device nearby that will teleport you back. Look around for it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}There should also be some stairs nearby, but I can't approve any more exploration right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We'll explore the upper floors next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_4TH_BTL_END
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10032 0 0}I no longer detect any Shadows. All the ones on this floor have been defeated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_4TH_BTL_END
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 82 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10033 0 0}It's all coming back to me. It would be wise for me to keep battling.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_4TH_BTL_END
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}You've already found the stairs, right? Should we head there now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUGGEST_TUTO_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}All right, we've secured the perimeter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We still have a little time before the Shadows reappear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It might be a good idea to do some reconnaissance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUGGEST_TUTO_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Nice work. We've secured the perimeter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We still have some time to spare before the Shadows reappear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It should be a little safer for you to scout ahead right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUGGEST_TUTO_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}One of you will split from the group to canvass the floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}That way, we'll be able to explore more efficiently, correct?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It's still risky, of course, but one person should have an easier time avoiding Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}If the scout can find the stairs, it'll lighten the load for {f 4 1} and the main squad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}So how about it? Anyone up to the task?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUGGEST_TUTO_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5064 0 0}One person will split from the party to scout the floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Exploring would be more efficient if we divide and conquer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}Going solo makes it easier to evade Shadows as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}And if the scout can locate the stairs, it'd make everyone's lives a lot easier.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}So what do you think? Should we ask someone to scout ahead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUGGEST_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}All right, we've secured the area. Shall we have someone scout ahead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUGGEST_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}We've secured the area. Do you want to send someone out to scout ahead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_YUKARI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}I'm on it! Just let me handle this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_SANADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3001 0 0}I'll go. My training's prepared me for this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Allow me. Don't worry, I'll clear us a path.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5068 0 0}Oh, I think Koro-chan's volunteering to go! What do you think, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_AEGIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6019 0 0}I'll go. I have experience conducting solo missions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_AMADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7002 0 0}Leave it to me! There's no way those Shadows will find me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_METIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30017 0 0}Sister, pick me! I'll prove myself useful![n]{f 1 1}
